<summary>
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   This is a long multi-session conversation on the **derup** project — an ER (Entity-Relationship) modeling tool with relational algebra capabilities deployed at https://derup.136.248.245.241.sslip.io/ on an Oracle ARM64 VPS (ubuntu@100.67.225.81).

   Across the conversation, the user requested progressively more features for derup:
   - Convert Dia .dia files to derup JSON format
   - Build complete ER models from scenarios (consorcios, fintech)
   - Add a relational algebra tab "muy parecido a https://dbis-uibk.github.io/relax/landing" with own engine, both Unicode and ASCII syntax, CSV data loading, Spanish UI
   - Make chat context-aware per tab (ER/Schema/SQL/Algebra)
   - Various autocomplete improvements
   - Inline ghost-text suggestions (Copilot-style)
   - Reverse-engineer ER from imported CSVs (with proper junction table detection — emp/dept/works pattern)
   - Migrate imported CSV data to schema tables on ER generation
   - Allow AI chat to execute queries directly (not just explain)
   - Full ABM (CRUD) of data via chat with confirmation
   - Activate Codex/OpenAI OAuth by default with auto-renewal
   - Hide ER toolbar on non-ER tabs
   - Resizable panels (splitters) for all frames
   - **Latest: support SQL syntax in the algebra editor** ("en sql esto deberia andar" — translate `select * from dept` to algebra)

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - TypeScript strict + Vite + React + Tailwind
   - Zod for AICommandSchema (discriminated union)
   - Custom relational algebra engine: tokenizer, Pratt parser, evaluator, state machine
   - Ramakrishnan & Gehrke (Cap 4) theory: σ π ρ ⋈ ⨯ ÷ ∪ ∩ −
   - De Miguel/Piattini cardinality convention (participation)
   - OAuth with PKCE for ChatGPT/Codex authentication, proactive token refresh
   - React patterns: useState lazy initial state, useMemo, useCallback, useEffect, useRef
   - Docker deploy on VPS with bind mount for `.oauth-tokens.json`
   - Splitter component for drag-to-resize panels
   - SQL → relational algebra translator (subset)
   - Ghost-text completion via overlay technique
   - Highlighting via transparent textarea + colored overlay div
   - localStorage for persistence (debounced + sync writes)
   - State machine for syntax-aware autocomplete (15 modes: START_REL, AFTER_REL, IN_SELECT_START, COND_OPERAND, COND_AFTER_COL, COND_AFTER_CMP, COND_DONE, IN_PROJECT_START, PROJECT_AFTER_COL, IN_RENAME_START, RENAME_FIRST, RENAME_AFTER_ARROW, RENAME_AFTER_PAIR, EXPECT_REL_ARG, EXPECT_REL_REF, ERROR_RECOVERY)

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - `src/utils/sqlToAlgebra.ts` (NEW — most recent file)
     - SQL to algebra translator covering common SELECT/FROM/WHERE/JOIN patterns
     - Function `sqlToAlgebra(input: string): { algebra: string; note: string } | null`
     - Handles: `SELECT * FROM r`, `SELECT c1,c2 FROM r`, `SELECT * FROM r WHERE cond`, `SELECT * FROM r, s`, `SELECT * FROM r CROSS JOIN s`, `SELECT * FROM r NATURAL JOIN s`, `SELECT * FROM r JOIN s ON cond`
     - Returns null for unsupported (GROUP BY, HAVING, ORDER BY, LIMIT, UNION, subqueries, aggregates, OUTER JOIN)
     - Helper functions: `findKeyword`, `parseFromClause`, `matchJoin`, `splitTopLevel`, `normalizeCondition`

   - `src/components/Views/AlgebraView.tsx` (MODIFIED — latest)
     - Added import: `import { sqlToAlgebra } from '../../utils/sqlToAlgebra';`
     - Added state: `const [sqlTranslationNote, setSqlTranslationNote] = useState<string | null>(null);`
     - Modified `runQuery` to detect SQL before parsing:
     ```ts
     const sqlTrans = sqlToAlgebra(query);
     if (sqlTrans) {
       setQuery(sqlTrans.algebra);
       setCaretPos(sqlTrans.algebra.length);
       setSqlTranslationNote(sqlTrans.note);
       setPendingRun(true);
       return;
     }
     ```
     - Added banner UI in render:
     ```tsx
     {sqlTranslationNote && (
       <div className="ra-sql-banner" title="...">
         <span className="ra-sql-icon">↪</span>
         <span>{sqlTranslationNote}</span>
         <button className="ra-sql-dismiss" onClick={() => setSqlTranslationNote(null)}>×</button>
       </div>
     )}
     ```

   - `src/components/Views/AlgebraView.css` (MODIFIED)
     - Added styles for `.ra-sql-banner`, `.ra-sql-icon`, `.ra-sql-dismiss` (amber/yellow theme)

   - `src/components/Splitter.tsx` (NEW earlier)
     - Reusable drag handle component with `onDragStart`, `onDrag`, `onDragEnd` callbacks
     - Vertical/horizontal orientations
     - Locks user-select and cursor during drag

   - `src/utils/reverseEngineerER.ts` — junction-table-aware reverse engineering
   - `src/components/Views/algebraPredict.ts` — state machine + scope-aware suggestions + ASCII aliases
   - `src/utils/aiCommands.ts` — extended with algebra-query and algebra-data commands
   - `src/App.tsx` — many additions: pendingAlgebraQuery, pendingAlgebraData states, sidebar splitter, hide toolbar conditional, context-aware chat prompts

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **TypeScript error: 'sqlTranslationNote' is declared but its value is never read** — fixed by adding the banner UI to render
   - **OAuth tokens not visible in Docker container** — added bind mount `-v ~/derup/.oauth-tokens.json:/app/.oauth-tokens.json:rw`
   - **`describeAIError` mislabeled openai as Ollama** — added explicit openai branch
   - **Infinite loop in algebraHighlight.tsx** — identifier/string/number branches didn't advance `i`; fixed with `i = j;`
   - **Editor text disappearing on focus** — global textarea:hover/focus had opaque background; fixed with high-specificity `.algebra-view textarea.ra-editor` rules with !important + transition: none
   - **Reverse engineering created false works→emp FK** — fixed with junction detection by shared column count
   - **Duplicate works/dept/emp showing as both schema tables and imported** — migrated imported data to tablesData synchronously
   - **Autocomplete not working for "sel"** — added ASCII aliases (σ → ['select', ...])
   - **Predict state machine ignored unexpected tokens silently** — added ERROR_RECOVERY mode
   - **caretPos not updating on textarea typing** — added `setCaretPos(e.target.selectionStart)` to onChange

5. Problem Solving:
   - SQL translator: regex-based pattern matching with proper paren depth tracking via `findKeyword`/`findKeywordPhrase` helpers
   - State machine + forward scan: when caret is inside σ/π/ρ body, scans suffix tokens to detect relation argument for scoped column suggestions
   - OAuth: proactive refresh on boot (5s delay) + every 30 min, /api/openai/health endpoint
   - Junction detection algorithm: count columns shared with other relations; if >=2 shared → no own PK, junction status
